docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $744.00 FILED BY ABARCA, ALBA AS TO DEFENDANT TRONOFF, MARITZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABARCA, ALBA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WAIVED) SERVED FEB-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRONOFF, MARITZA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALBA ABARCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARITZA TRONOFF IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABARCA, ALBA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRONOFF, MARITZA JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF TO RECEIVE NOTHING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
